_comment: Drop only the incompatible 3D-stroke STRUCTS (DataStroke3D + its keyframe DataStroke3DKey -- v11's keyframe uses 'pressure' not opacity/size). KEEP DataEmitterStroke3D: it's an entity (uid) whose members are all v11-valid AND it's a SINGLE-object field DataBrushStamp.stampsEmitter -- dropping the type removes that required field -> v11 null-derefs. strokes3D arrays just go empty.
